hypothesis: Fine-tuning LoQI with paired protein pocket descriptors (e.g., local 3D electrostatic and steric grids) using ~1,000 protein–ligand complexes will enable the model to generate ligand bound-state conformations that match experimental crystal structures with a median heavy-atom RMSD ≤ 0.6 Å using ≤10 sampled conformers per ligand on the Platinum Diverse test set, thereby outperforming unconditioned LoQI and RDKit ETKDG.
